info.title: Injective BFF API
info.description: Backend-for-Frontend API providing transformed market data for Injective

BffSpotMarket.description: Spot market with token metadata and UI fields from Injective SDK

BffTcSpotMarket.description: Spot market with required token metadata from Injective SDK

BffHelixSpotMarket.description: Helix spot market with required token metadata from Injective SDK

BffAccountBalancesResponse.description: Bank balances response with transformed token metadata

BffBalanceWithToken.description: Balance entry with full token metadata

BffPortfolioResponse.description: Account portfolio response with bank balances and subaccount balances

BffSubaccountBalanceWithToken.description: Subaccount balance entry with flattened deposit and full token metadata

BffCW20BalancesResponse.description: CW20 balances response with enriched token metadata

BffCW20BalanceWithToken.description: CW20 balance entry with contract address and full token metadata

disableTrading.description: Whether all trading is currently disabled. Only present when app=tc.

BffAppConfig.description: Combined network and app configuration data including announcements, banned countries, and chain upgrade config

BffAnnouncement.description: App announcement configuration with title, description, optional link, and date range

BffChainUpgradeConfig.description: Chain upgrade configuration with proposal details

BffDerivativeMarket.description: Derivative market with token metadata and UI fields from Injective SDK

BffTcDerivativeMarket.description: Derivative market with required quote token metadata from Injective SDK

BffHelixDerivativeMarket.description: Helix derivative market with required quote token metadata from Injective SDK

get.description: Fetches spot markets from Injective blockchain with token metadata and UI fields

get.summary: Get spot markets with token metadata
get.description: Fetches spot markets from Injective blockchain and transforms them with token metadata

get.summary: Get Helix spot markets with token metadata
get.description: Fetches spot markets from Injective blockchain and transforms them with Helix branding

200.description: Helix spot markets with token metadata

get.description: Fetches merged token metadata (chain + human overrides) for a given denom
Check if the service is healthy and database is connected
Returns 200 only when MongoDB and Redis answer a live ping from this pod. Designed for the Kubernetes readinessProbe so traffic is shed from pods that cannot actually serve requests.

200.description: Pod is ready to serve traffic

503.description: Pod cannot serve traffic (Mongo or Redis unreachable)

post.description: Start watching for a deposit from user to safe address

amount.description: Optional human readable USDC amount used purely to render an estimated fee in the response. The user-approved fee cap is amount-agnostic (stored as bps).

200.description: Deposit watch initiated or reused successfully

maxFeeBps.description: User-approved fast-transfer fee cap as a decimal-bps string (Circle minimumFee × 1.2). For standard transfers, equal to Circle minimumFee with no inflation.

fee.description: Estimated human-readable fee in USDC at the requested amount. Only present when amount is supplied.

depositId.description: ID of the existing or newly-tracked deposit row. Returned on idempotent reuse.

status.description: `pending` (fresh schedule, no row yet), `in_flight` (existing pre-burn row reused), or `retrying` (previously-failed row re-armed by the user).

stateName.description: Human-readable bridge state name for the existing row, when reused.

400.description: Bad request - invalid chain or failed to create safe account

409.description: Conflict — an existing transfer for this safe address blocks scheduling a new one (refund in progress, or admin reconciliation required).

error.example: A refund is in progress for this transfer. You will receive your funds shortly.

failureReason.example: Lost pendingAction claim before burn submission

502.description: Bad gateway - failed to fetch CCTP fee from upstream

503.description: Service unavailable - failed to schedule deposit monitoring

get.summary: Get deposit status for an address
get.description: Get all deposits for a user address with pagination. Accepts both EVM (0x...) and Injective (inj1...) addresses.

post.description: Mark one or more deposits or withdrawals as notified by the client

ids.description: Array of deposit or withdrawal IDs to mark as notified

updated.description: Number of transfers marked as notified

post.description: Executes Circle CCTP V2 MessageTransmitter.receiveMessage on the destination chain using the BFF server wallet.

400.description: Invalid request body or unsupported destination chain

409.description: Message was already processed or is currently being relayed

post.description: Start watching for a withdrawal from user to safe address on Injective EVM. The server burns the user-funded USDC on Injective and mints it on the destination chain, taking a flat service fee for paying gas on both sides.

srcChainId.description: Must be an Injective EVM chain id

isFastTransfer.description: Fast transfer is unverified for Injective-source burns and is forced to false by the server.

200.description: Withdrawal watch initiated or reused successfully

serviceFee.description: Flat service fee in USDC base units

circleFee.description: Maximum Circle CCTP protocol fee in USDC base units, including the fast-transfer safety margin when applicable (null if amount omitted)

total.description: serviceFee + circleFee, in USDC base units

fees.description: Fee breakdown the user will pay

depositId.description: ID of the existing or newly-tracked withdrawal row. Returned on idempotent reuse.

status.description: `pending` (fresh schedule), `in_flight` (existing pre-burn row reused), or `retrying` (previously-failed row re-armed by the user).

stateName.description: Human-readable bridge state name for the existing row, when reused.

400.description: Bad request — invalid chain, amount too small, or failed to derive safe

error.example: srcChainId must be an Injective chain

409.description: Conflict — an existing withdrawal for this safe address blocks scheduling a new one (refund in progress, or admin reconciliation required).

error.example: A refund is in progress for this transfer. You will receive your funds shortly.

failureReason.example: Lost pendingAction claim before burn submission

502.description: Bad gateway — failed to fetch CCTP fee from upstream

503.description: Service unavailable — failed to schedule withdrawal monitoring

get.summary: Get withdrawal status for an address
get.description: Get all withdrawals for a user address with pagination. Accepts both EVM (0x...) and Injective (inj1...) addresses.
Returns registered Expo devices for the authenticated mobile user on the requested network. Defaults to Mainnet when `network` is omitted.

patch.description: Updates notification preferences for one device. Allowed values are filled, liquidated, margin_warning, price_change, or any combination thereof.

post.description: Registers or updates a device token for the authenticated mobile user.
Removes a previously registered Expo device token for the authenticated user on the requested network. Defaults to Mainnet if `network` is omitted.

get.description: Lists notifications for the authenticated mobile user.
Returns all notification alert configurations for the authenticated mobile user on the requested network. Returns defaults for any configs that have not been explicitly set.

patch.description: Bulk update notification alert configurations for the authenticated mobile user on the requested network. Any config not included in the request body is left unchanged.
Marks a notification as unread, read, or deleted for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the authenticated mobile user.
Returns the price alert configuration for the authenticated mobile user.

500.description: Failed to fetch price alert config

patch.description: Updates the price alert configuration for the authenticated mobile user.

500.description: Failed to update price alert config

get.description: Returns the margin alert configuration for the authenticated mobile user. Returns defaults if no config exists.

500.description: Failed to fetch margin alert config

patch.description: Updates the margin alert configuration for the authenticated mobile user.

500.description: Failed to update margin alert config

get.description: Returns the liquidation alert configuration for the authenticated mobile user. Returns defaults if no config exists.

500.description: Failed to fetch liquidation alert config

patch.description: Updates the liquidation alert configuration for the authenticated mobile user.

500.description: Failed to update liquidation alert config

get.description: Fetches a paginated list of merged token metadata for a given network
Fetches on-chain bank balances for an address with full token metadata
Fetches account portfolio with bank balances and subaccount balances, including full token metadata
Fetches CW20 token balances for an address with enriched token metadata

post.description: Returns a signed provider URL and normalized fee breakdown.

get.description: Returns configured onramp providers available in the requested country.
Checks whether a wallet address has already claimed any entry code.

200.description: Entry code claim status for wallet address

post.summary: Verify and claim an entry code
post.description: Verifies an entry code for a wallet address. If valid and not previously used by this address, it also claims one usage slot for that address.

403.description: Entry code is disabled, expired, or fully used

post.description: Sends a small amount of INJ to the provided Injective address if it passes balance and rate-limit checks.

409.description: Address already has sufficient INJ balance

get.description: Returns the authenticated TC web user.

post.description: POC endpoint. Returns the caller's injective address. Requires a valid JWT (401 if not authenticated).

get.description: Fetches the combined network and app-specific configuration for a given FE product

post.description: Returns Polymarket Builder authentication headers for the provided request payload.

500.description: Signing failed or credentials are not configured

get.description: Fetches perpetual derivative markets from Injective blockchain with token metadata and UI fields

get.summary: Get derivative markets with token metadata
get.description: Fetches perpetual derivative markets from Injective blockchain and transforms them with token metadata

get.summary: Get Helix derivative markets with token metadata
get.description: Fetches perpetual derivative markets from Injective blockchain and transforms them with Helix branding

200.description: Helix derivative markets with token metadata

post.description: Validates wallet signature and issues JWT + refresh token cookie. Supports autosign via granterAddress.

data.example: Sign this message to authenticate with Injective Admin. Nonce: 9a1418fd-efdb-455d-9c61-57fcdadfb2f0

refreshTokenExpiresAt.description: Refresh token expiration timestamp in milliseconds

401.description: Invalid signature or authz grant missing or expired

post.description: Generates a nonce used to sign an authentication message.
Revokes the active refresh token and clears auth cookies.
Revokes all refresh tokens for the authenticated address.
Validates wallet signature and issues JWT + refresh token cookie. Supports autosign via granterAddress.

data.example: Sign this message to authenticate with Injective Admin. Nonce: 9a1418fd-efdb-455d-9c61-57fcdadfb2f0

refreshTokenExpiresAt.description: Refresh token expiration timestamp in milliseconds

401.description: Invalid signature or authz grant missing or expired

post.description: Generates a nonce used to sign an authentication message.
Revokes the active refresh token and clears auth cookies.
Revokes all refresh tokens for the authenticated address.

post.summary: Verify and claim an entry code (authenticated)
post.description: Verifies an entry code for the authenticated wallet address. If valid and not previously used by this address, it also claims one usage slot.

403.description: Entry code is disabled, expired, or fully used
